rows.label: qev027103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, I have been awaiting your return,
O bringer of light to our future...! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thanks to you, everything
went perfectly! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Adappin exposed himself to disgrace by answering "Yes"
to absolutely every question from the reporters covering
the election, and has already fallen from grace. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0004
rows.name:
I feel slightly sorry for him, but this
too is for our future. Let us keep in our
hearts that it was a noble sacrifice. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Following Adappin's downfall, the Nopon candidate
finally responded to our persuasion and said
he would begin actively campaigning. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0006
rows.name:
For starters, he is scheduled to
give a speech here today. I highly
encourage you to stay and listen. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ah, it seems he is about to begin.
It is the speech of the Nopon
representative, candidate Kopopo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0008
rows.name: Er, *ahem*, *ahem*. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0009
rows.name:
Nice to meet you. I am Nopon
representative, Kopopo, mo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0010
rows.name:
If Kopopo joins provisional
government... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0011
rows.name: First, I establish Nopon Tax, mo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0012
rows.name:
This means when Nopon shop in
NLA city, they get negative
80 percent tax rate, mo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is revolutionary policy
where Nopon profit greatly
even when doing business, mo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is truly politics of Nopon,
by Nopon, for Nopon, mo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0015
rows.name:
Kopopo will forcefully
push this through, mo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0016
rows.name: Please give me your support, mo-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0018
rows.name: What in the world............ [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0019
rows.name:
This is hardly any different from the
Ma-non's policy proposal............ [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0020
rows.name:
But... But perhaps this
is just how it is. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0021
rows.name:
Even if there is some bias initially, by
asserting the rights of alien species, we
clarify our position within the government. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0022
rows.name:
And perhaps the very debates born
from that are the true political
participation we have sought...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0023
rows.name:
What do you think? How
does it seem to you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that it is fine for the Nopon
to remain the representative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_JNK0020
rows.name: Propose[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest that the Orphe should run.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0024
rows.name:
I suppose so... Let us believe that
this was not a mistake after all. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0025
rows.name:
Of course, sending Kopopo into
the government does not mean our
activities are concluded. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0026
rows.name:
We plan to continue supporting him across species
lines, and strive to better the rights of aliens
in NLA and our relationship with Earthlings. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0027
rows.name: You have done exceptional work. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0028
rows.name:
On behalf of all alien species
living in NLA, I thank you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0029
rows.name: ...Thank you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0030
rows.name:
Instead of the Nopon... we should
become the representatives? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0031
rows.name:
That path... I had never
considered it before. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0032
rows.name:
However, our species has an
overwhelmingly small population. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0033
rows.name:
In other words, we cannot expect
a fixed number of votes like
the Ma-non or the Nopon. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0034
rows.name:
This is a factor that inevitably
makes us quite passive. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0035
rows.name:
If we could be certain that we possessed a special
support base elsewhere, then the idea of us standing
instead would carry some realism, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0036
rows.name:
What do you think? Are there
people in the city of NLA who
would support us Orphe? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0037
rows.name:
If you wouldn't mind, could
you verify that for us? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027103_MSG0038
rows.name:
If we can be certain that we have support from
outside our own kind, then we will resolve to
become the representatives for the alien species. [ST:wait ]
